items.title: TypeScript compiles clean
items.precondition: npm ci on Node 22 in the worktree

items.title: Better category yields a draft-status A6 business_info work item with the category patch
items.precondition: unit test with GbpBusinessInfoDraftService.createDraft real; settings enabled + Google ready mocked
items.expected: Model create called once with content_type=business_info, status=draft, business_info_payload.patch.categories.primaryCategory set, updateMask=[categories]
items.evidence: 8 passed (8) — incl. 'with the master switch on and Google ready, stages a draft-status item'

items.title: No better category proposes nothing (never a manufactured change)
items.expected: recommendPrimaryCategory returns null and proposeCategoryDraft returns {proposed:false}; createDraft not called
items.evidence: 'proposes nothing when no specialty signal' + 'stages nothing when there is no better category' pass

items.title: Write is unbypassable — master switch off blocks staging before any work item is created
items.expected: proposeCategoryDraft rejects with BUSINESS_INFO_WRITEBACK_DISABLED; GbpWorkItemModel.create never called; readiness never consulted
items.evidence: 'throws BUSINESS_INFO_WRITEBACK_DISABLED and creates no work item when the master switch is off' passes
items.notes: Owner-approval gate is a separate transition (status stays draft); no code path in the new files imports a Google write. Live Google write itself is unverified here (no credentials — Dave's runtime gate).

items.title: No new backend Constitution violations
items.evidence: CHECK_EXIT=0; 'CLEAR structural violations — backend (size + console + db): 0'
